title: CompositeInputSplit for Join Operations
description: The CompositeInputSplit.java file in the lib/join directory of Hadoop MapReduce is responsible for managing a collection of InputSplits. It serves as an aggregate, allowing for the addition, retrieval, and aggregation of child InputSplits. This class implements the Writable interface for serialization and deserialization. Its core logic revolves around managing an array of InputSplit objects, providing methods to add, retrieve, and calculate properties of these InputSplits. It's a crucial component for join operations in Hadoop MapReduce, facilitating the handling of multiple datasets with different partitioning and sorting. The class interacts with various Hadoop libraries and standard Java collections, demonstrating a clear architectural role in managing complex data splits for join operations.
